mapper.sql: shoppingCarId, userId, goodsId, goodsNum, categoryName, goodsName, goodsImgUrl, price, size,color, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into shopping_car
pkId,
shoppingCarId,
userId,
goodsId,
goodsNum,
categoryId,
categoryName,
goodsName,
goodsImgUrl,
price,
createdDate,
size,
color,
style,
freight,
#{pkId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{shoppingCarId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{freight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
mapper.update:
update shopping_car
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsNum = #{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
categoryName = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsName = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsImgUrl = #{goodsImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where shoppingCarId = #{shoppingCarId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update shopping_car set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, goodsNum = #{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, categoryName = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goodsName = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goodsImgUrl = #{goodsImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where shoppingCarId = #{shoppingCarId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pkId,s.shoppingCarId, s.userId, s.goodsId, s.goodsNum, s.categoryName, s.goodsName, s.goodsImgUrl, concat(s.price,'') as price, s.size, s.createdDate,concat(s.freight,'') as freight,s.color,s.style,s.categoryId from shopping_car s where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY createdDate DESC
mapper.update:
update shopping_car
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsNum = #{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
categoryName = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsName = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsImgUrl = #{goodsImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
where pkId = #{pkId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from shopping_car where userId = #{userId} AND goodsId = #{goodsId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shopping_car WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} AND userId = #{uId}
mapper.update: UPDATE shopping_car SET goodsNum = #{goodsNum}+goodsNum WHERE pkId = #{pkId}
mapper.select: select categoryId, freight from goods where goodsId = #{goodsId} limit 1
